description: Create a content slide with a two-column comparison table contrasting Industry 4.0 and the Industrial Internet across key dimensions.

header.kicker: 3. Digital Transformation – The digital economy is here
header.headline: Industry is fundamentally influenced by Digital Transformation – Industry 4.0 and the Industrial Internet address different aspects

rows: German Government, acatech (National Academy of Science and Engineering)
Industrial policy: "the German strategic initiative to take up a pioneering role in industrial IT"
Supply chain coordination, embedded systems, automation, robotics
Large Multinationals such as GE, AT&T, Intel, IBM, Cisco
Three (industrial revolution, internet revolution, industrial internet revolution)
Interoperability: "establishing interoperability in various industrial environments"
Manufacturing, energy, transportation, healthcare, utilities, cities, agriculture
Device communication, controls and integration, data flows, predictive analytics, automation
